title: Sanji Faces the Vinsmokes
description: On pages 2–5, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Luffy, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Brook as The Straw Hats enter Big Mom’s strange territory while Sanji faces the Vinsmoke family and the arranged marriage.
scene: Sanji is forced back into the Vinsmoke family’s control, revealing the cruelty behind his royal bloodline.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: If you try to leave this island...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Well, let's just say you'll be cooking with your feet!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: The Prince has been trapped!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...I'll definitely have you proceed with the marriage !!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Cut the bullshit!! Get these things off of me!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Don't try to forcefully remove them!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: PIPI PIPI PIPI

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Let go of the wristlet, Sanji!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Touch...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There's no way to get them off other than to use their respective keys...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: How many times do we have to repeat ourselves?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Your hands are a mess!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Get it through that thick skull of yours...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: These precious hands are not meant for fighting, got it?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Owwww Wee!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: GOD DAMN IT!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: In the vicinity of sweet city

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Boss jinbe actually turned his back on Mama?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: to think that this all went down yesterday...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Man...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It was cool of him to bring one of Mama's tantrums to an end that one time, but this... this is just nuts.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: word has it that right after he stormed into her place asking to be cut loose...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...he got all weak in the knees when Mama demanded he make "the payment".

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: That's when he started backtrack- ing!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Anyone seems

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Get the hell outta here!! That's so weak!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Hahaha, yeah, what a wuss!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Ha! "Jinbe, Knight of the Sea"?! More like "Jinbe, Blight of the Sea"!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So he not only turned out to be a traitor, but he's also a yellow-bellied coward!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Jinbe....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: I have my current position to consider.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I see... so you were a subordinate in big mom's crew. This explains why fishman Island used to be under her protection.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: An ex- shichibukai...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: to think that she'd have underlings of this caliber!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Brook, are you acquainted with this man?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Yes. He... is a very important individual to us!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Once I have fulfilled my duty and am free of such constraints...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I hope that you will invite me once more... to join the straw hat pirates!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This must be precisely what he was talking about back then!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...In any case... the man described in this article sounds nothing like the jinbe we know.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...Does this mean that jinbe has had a change of heart in terms of joining our crew...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: O!! Brook!!

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island storyline with 42 dialogue beats. Whole Cake Island becomes a hostile fairy-tale battlefield where Sanji’s rescue and Big Mom’s power are both unavoidable.
